architecture: Single npm package with OpenClaw bundled
memory_system: Hybrid: File-based (transparency) + Local vector DB (semantic search)

steps.claude_prompt:
Create package.json for askelira npm package:

- name: askelira
- version: 2.0.0
- bin: { askelira: './bin/cli.js' }
- dependencies: openclaw, @pinecone-database/pinecone, chromadb, commander
- peerDependencies: node >= 18
- scripts: postinstall, start
- MIT license

Work in: ~/Desktop/askelira-bundled-npm/

Create project directory structure:

mkdir -p src/{agents,cli,gateway,memory,ui}
mkdir -p bin
mkdir -p config
mkdir -p templates

Create .gitignore: node_modules/, .env, *.log, data/

Work in: ~/Desktop/askelira-bundled-npm/

steps.success_criteria: Runs swarm and saves to memory

note: Phase 1 only - creates foundation. Full 100 steps would include: Phase 2 (Agent implementation), Phase 3 (Memory system), Phase 4 (UI), Phase 5 (Desktop app), Phase 6 (Templates), Phase 7 (Testing), Phase 8 (Documentation), Phase 9 (Publishing), Phase 10 (Marketing)
